title: White Non-Woven Disposable Bed Mats for Kids ( 90 x 60 cm) Pack of 3 - Discreet & Comfortable, Ideal for Overnight Bedding Protection
features: SUPER ABSORBENT PROTECTION: Each mat in our three-pack of white bed mats for kids measures 90 x 60 cm and is designed to offer superior overnight bedding protection.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS: Crafted from non-woven PP, paper SAP, and PE materials, these mats are designed for single use, ensuring that your child's sleep environment remains hygienic and comfortable all night long.

EASY TO USE & DISPOSE OF: Simply place the bed mat on top of your child's sheet or mattress, with the absorbent side facing up. Once used, simply roll up and dispose of in a trash bin for hassle-free clean-up.

PERFECT FOR OVERNIGHT USE: Specifically crafted for overnight use, these bed mats are an ideal solution for potty training, bedwetting, or any situation requiring extra protection for your child's bedding.
DISCREET & COMFORTABLE: Your child won't even notice these ultra-thin mats that offer peace of mind without compromising on comfort. Designed to blend in seamlessly with your child's bedding.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality pack of disposable bed mats contains three individual blankets design to be super absorbent and ideal for protecting children's bedding through the night. Safety Warning No warning applicable
